author: Frosty40
name: X-WING Yellow II: 3D Cubric + Complementary Training
blurb: Podracer engine with chunk-based shared n-gram tables + 3D cubric pattern recognizer (54 adaptive multipliers: order × entropy_bin × count_bin) + complementary training (downweight bigram-predictable tokens). Orders 2-9, alpha 0.20-0.75. Seed 1337 val_bpb=0.4896. Additional seeds pending.
